summary: An audiogram from the DHS Blue Campaign '#TacklingTrafficking' series: a static blue graphic with a play icon and audio-waveform animation plays a recorded clip of Forensic Interview Specialist Lauren G. saying that trafficking victims are typically groomed rather than kidnapped, with her words shown as text-card captions. There is no video footage and no music, only narrated interview audio over a fixed graphic.
notable_text: #TacklingTrafficking FACT; Unlike what is portrayed in the media; LAUREN G. Forensic Interview Specialist; BLUE CAMPAIGN
